shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'! .next'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && (sed -n '1,220p' package.json || true) && printf '\\n--- auth refs ---\\n' && rg -n \"auth|session|forbidden|unauthorized|admin|notFound|redirect\" -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'! .next'"' . | head -240"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' app/lib/auth.ts && printf '\\n--- page ---\\n' && sed -n '1,240p' app/page.tsx && printf '\\n--- layout ---\\n' && sed -n '1,240p' app/layout.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- lock auth funcs ---\\n' && rg -n 'authInterrupts|forbidden\\(|unauthorized\\(|forbidden\\.tsx|unauthorized\\.tsx' node_modules/next 2>/dev/null | head -100"

/bin/bash -lc "curl -sS -D - -o /tmp/admin-response.html http://localhost:3000/admin | sed -n '1,20p' && printf '\\n--- body markers ---\\n' && rg -o 'Error 403|Access denied|Admin Dashboard' /tmp/admin-response.html | sort | uniq -c"
/bin/bash -lc "git diff -- next.config.ts app/admin/page.tsx app/forbidden.tsx tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba app/admin/page.tsx && printf '\\n--- forbidden ---\\n' && nl -ba app/forbidden.tsx && printf '\\n--- config ---\\n' && nl -ba next.config.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- root dirs ---\\n' && find . -maxdepth 2 -type d -not -path './node_modules*' -print"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
